    *   [RangeObject][512]## ePubCreates a new Book### Parameters*   `url` **([string][513] | [ArrayBuffer][514])** URL, Path or ArrayBuffer
*   `options` **[object][515]** to pass to the book### Examples```javascript
ePub("/path/to/book.epub", {})
```Returns **[Book][4]** a new Book object## BookAn Epub representation with methods for the loading, parsing and manipulation
of its contents.### Parameters*   `url` **[string][513]?**&#x20;
*   `options` **[object][515]?**&#x20;

    *   `options.requestMethod` **method?** a request function to use instead of the default
    *   `options.requestCredentials` **[boolean][516]** send the xhr request withCredentials (optional, default `undefined`)
    *   `options.requestHeaders` **[object][515]** send the xhr request headers (optional, default `undefined`)
    *   `options.encoding` **[string][513]** optional to pass 'binary' or base64' for archived Epubs (optional, default `binary`)
    *   `options.replacements` **[string][513]** use base64, blobUrl, or none for replacing assets in archived Epubs (optional, default `none`)
    *   `options.canonical` **method?** optional function to determine canonical urls for a path
    *   `options.openAs` **[string][513]?** optional string to determine the input type
    *   `options.store` **[string][513]** cache the contents in local storage, value should be the name of the reader (optional, default `false`)### Examples```javascript
new Book("/path/to/book.epub", {})
``````javascript
new Book({ replacements: "blobUrl" })
```Returns **[Book][4]** ### openOpen a epub or url#### Parameters*   `input` **([string][513] | [ArrayBuffer][514])** Url, Path or ArrayBuffer
*   `what` **[string][513]** force opening as a certain type (optional, default `"binary","base64","epub","opf","json","directory"`)#### Examples```javascript
book.open("/path/to/book.epub")
```Returns **[Promise][517]** of when the book has been loaded### loadLoad a resource from the Book#### Parameters*   `path` **[string][513]** path to the resource to loadReturns **[Promise][517]** returns a promise with the requested resource### resolveResolve a path to it's absolute position in the Book#### Parameters*   `path` **[string][513]**&#x20;
*   `absolute` **[boolean][516]?** force resolving the full URLReturns **[string][513]** the resolved path string### canonicalGet a canonical link to a path#### Parameters*   `path` **[string][513]**&#x20;Returns **[string][513]** the canonical path string### sectionGets a Section of the Book from the Spine
Alias for `book.spine.get`#### Parameters*   `target` **[string][513]**&#x20;Returns **[Section][16]** ### renderToSugar to render a book to an element#### Parameters*   `element` **([element][518] | [string][513])** element or string to add a rendition to
*   `options` **[object][515]?**&#x20;Returns **[Rendition][206]** ### setRequestCredentialsSet if request should use withCredentials#### Parameters*   `credentials` **[boolean][516]**&#x20;### setRequestHeadersSet headers request should use#### Parameters*   `headers` **[object][515]**&#x20;### coverUrlGet the cover urlReturns **[Promise][517]<[string][513]?>** coverUrl### getRangeFind a DOM Range for a given CFI Range#### Parameters*   `cfiRange` **[EpubCFI][355]** a epub cfi rangeReturns **[Promise][517]** ### keyGenerates the Book Key using the identifier in the manifest or other string provided#### Parameters*   `identifier` **[string][513]?** to use instead of metadata identifierReturns **[string][513]** key### destroyDestroy the Book and all associated objects### opened### spineType: [Spine][31]### locationsType: [Locations][32]### navigationType: [Navigation][33]### pagelistType: [PageList][34]## DisplayOptionsOpen DisplayOptions Format Parser### Parameters*   `displayOptionsDocument` **[document][519]** XML### parseParse XML#### Parameters*   `displayOptionsDocument` **[document][519]** XMLReturns **[DisplayOptions][35]** self## Urlcreates a Url object for parsing and manipulation of a url string### Parameters*   `urlString` **[string][513]** a url string (relative or absolute)
*   `baseString` **[string][513]?** optional base for the url,
    default to window\.location.href### pathReturns **[Path][41]** ### resolveResolves a relative path to a absolute url#### Parameters*   `what` **[string][513]**&#x20;Returns **[string][513]** url### relativeResolve a path relative to the url#### Parameters*   `what` **[string][513]**&#x20;Returns **[string][513]** path### toStringReturns **[string][513]** ## PathCreates a Path object for parsing and manipulation of a path stringsUses a polyfill for Nodejs path: [https://nodejs.org/api/path.html][520]### Parameters*   `pathString` **[string][513]** a url string (relative or absolute)### parseParse the path: [https://nodejs.org/api/path.html#path\_path\_parse\_path][521]#### Parameters*   `what` **[string][513]**&#x20;Returns **[object][515]** ### isAbsolute#### Parameters*   `what` **[string][513]**&#x20;Returns **[boolean][516]** ### isDirectoryCheck if path ends with a directory#### Parameters*   `what` **[string][513]**&#x20;Returns **[boolean][516]** ### resolveResolve a path against the directory of the Path[https://nodejs.org/api/path.html#path\_path\_resolve\_paths][522]#### Parameters*   `what` **[string][513]**&#x20;Returns **[string][513]** resolved### relativeResolve a path relative to the directory of the Path[https://nodejs.org/api/path.html#path\_path\_relative\_from\_to][523]#### Parameters*   `what` **[string][513]**&#x20;Returns **[string][513]** relative### toStringReturn the path stringReturns **[string][513]** path## SpineA collection of Spine Items### unpackUnpack items from a opf into spine items#### Parameters*   `_package` **[Packaging][115]**&#x20;
*   `resolver` **method** URL resolver
*   `canonical` **method** Resolve canonical url### getGet an item from the spine#### Parameters*   `target` **([string][513] | [number][524])?**&#x20;#### Examples```javascript
spine.get();
``````javascript
spine.get(1);
``````javascript
spine.get("chap1.html");
``````javascript
spine.get("#id1234");
```Returns **[Section][16]** section### eachLoop over the Sections in the SpineReturns **method** forEach### firstFind the first Section in the SpineReturns **[Section][16]** first section### lastFind the last Section in the SpineReturns **[Section][16]** last section## SectionRepresents a Section of the BookIn most books this is equivalent to a Chapter### Parameters*   `item` **[object][515]** The spine item representing the section
*   `hooks` **[object][515]** hooks for serialize and content### loadLoad the section from its url#### Parameters*   `_request` **method?** a request method to use for loadingReturns **[document][519]** a promise with the xml document### renderRender the contents of a section#### Parameters*   `_request` **method?** a request method to use for loadingReturns **[string][513]** output a serialized XML Document### findFind a string in a section#### Parameters*   `_query` **[string][513]** The query string to findReturns **[Array][525]<[object][515]>** A list of matches, with form {cfi, excerpt}### searchSearch a string in multiple sequential Element of the section. If the document.createTreeWalker api is missed(eg: IE8), use `find` as a fallback.#### Parameters*   `_query` **[string][513]** The query string to search
*   `maxSeqEle` **int** The maximum number of Element that are combined for search, default value is 5. (optional, default `5`)Returns **[Array][525]<[object][515]>** A list of matches, with form {cfi, excerpt}### reconcileLayoutSettingsReconciles the current chapters layout properties with
the global layout properties.#### Parameters*   `globalLayout` **[object][515]** The global layout settings object, chapter properties stringReturns **[object][515]** layoutProperties Object with layout properties### cfiFromRangeGet a CFI from a Range in the Section#### Parameters*   `_range` **[range][526]**&#x20;Returns **[string][513]** cfi an EpubCFI string### cfiFromElementGet a CFI from an Element in the Section#### Parameters*   `el` **[element][518]**&#x20;Returns **[string][513]** cfi an EpubCFI string### unloadUnload the section document## LocationsFind Locations for a Book### Parameters*   `spine` **[Spine][31]**&#x20;
*   `request` **[request][527]**&#x20;
*   `pause` **[number][524]**  (optional, default `100`)### generateLoad all of sections in the book to generate locations#### Parameters*   `chars` **int** how many chars to split onReturns **[Promise][517]<[Array][525]<[string][513]>>** locations### generateForSectionGenerate precise locations for a single section and splice them into
the existing locations array, replacing any entries (e.g. synthetic)
that already belong to that section.This allows progressive refinement: call once per section as the reader
navigates through the book without the cost of a full generate().#### Parameters*   `section` **[Section][16]** epub.js Section object (must have .cfiBase, .load(), .unload(), .linear)
*   `chars` **int?** chars per location break (defaults to this.break)Returns **[Promise][517]<[Array][525]<[string][513]>>** full updated locations array### generateFromWordsLoad all of sections in the book to generate locations#### Parameters*   `startCfi` **[string][513]** start position
*   `wordCount` **int** how many words to split on
*   `count` **int** result countReturns **[object][515]** locations### locationFromCfiGet a location from an EpubCFI#### Parameters*   `cfi` **[EpubCFI][355]**&#x20;Returns **[number][524]** ### percentageFromCfiGet a percentage position in locations from an EpubCFI#### Parameters*   `cfi` **[EpubCFI][355]**&#x20;Returns **[number][524]** ### percentageFromLocationGet a percentage position from a location index#### Parameters*   `loc` &#x20;
*   `location` **[number][524]**&#x20;Returns **[number][524]** ### cfiFromLocationGet an EpubCFI from location index#### Parameters*   `loc` **[number][524]**&#x20;Returns **[EpubCFI][355]** cfi### cfiFromPercentageGet an EpubCFI from location percentage#### Parameters*   `percentage` **[number][524]**&#x20;Returns **[EpubCFI][355]** cfi### loadLoad locations from JSON#### Parameters*   `locations` **[json][528]**&#x20;### saveSave locations to JSONReturns **[json][528]** ### currentLocationGet the current location### currentLocationSet the current location#### Parameters*   `curr` &#x20;### lengthLocations length## ContainerHandles Parsing and Accessing an Epub Container### Parameters*   `containerDocument` **[document][519]?** xml document### parseParse the Container XML#### Parameters*   `containerDocument` **[document][519]**&#x20;## PackagingOpen Packaging Format Parser### Parameters*   `packageDocument` **[document][519]** OPF XML### parseParse OPF XML#### Parameters*   `packageDocument` **[document][519]** OPF XMLReturns **[object][515]** parsed package parts### loadLoad JSON Manifest#### Parameters*   `json` &#x20;
*   `packageDocument` **[document][519]** OPF XMLReturns **[object][515]** parsed package parts## NavigationNavigation Parser### Parameters*   `xml` **[document][519]** navigation html / xhtml / ncx### parseParse out the navigation items#### Parameters*   `xml` **[document][519]** navigation html / xhtml / ncx### getGet an item from the navigation#### Parameters*   `target` **[string][513]**&#x20;Returns **[object][515]** navItem### getByIndexGet an item from navigation subitems recursively by index#### Parameters*   `target` **[string][513]**&#x20;
*   `index` **[number][524]**&#x20;

*   `parent` **[string][513]** idReturns **[array][525]** navigation list### loadLoad Spine Items#### Parameters*   `json` **[object][515]** the items to be loadedReturns **[Array][525]** navItems### forEachforEach pass through#### Parameters*   `fn` **[Function][530]** function to run on each itemReturns **method** forEach loop## ResourcesHandle Package Resources### Parameters*   `manifest` **Manifest**&#x20;
*   `options` **[object][515]?**&#x20;

*   `resolver` **resolver?**&#x20;Returns **[Array][525]<[string][513]>** array with relative Urls### getGet a URL for a resource#### Parameters*   `path` **[string][513]**&#x20;Returns **[string][513]** url### substituteSubstitute urls in content, with replacements,
relative to a url if provided#### Parameters*   `content` **[string][513]**&#x20;
*   `url` **[string][513]?** url to resolve toReturns **[string][513]** content with urls substituted## PageListPage List Parser### Parameters*   `xml` **[document][519]?**&#x20;### parseParse PageList Xml#### Parameters*   `xml` **[document][519]**&#x20;### pageFromCfiGet a PageList result from a EpubCFI#### Parameters*   `cfi` **[string][513]** EpubCFI StringReturns **([string][513] | [number][524])** page### cfiFromPageGet an EpubCFI from a Page List Item#### Parameters*   `pg` **([string][513] | [number][524])**&#x20;Returns **[string][513]** cfi### hrefFromPageGet an href from a Page List Item#### Parameters*   `pg` **([string][513] | [number][524])**&#x20;Returns **([string][513] | [undefined][531])** href### pageFromHrefGet a Page List Item from an href#### Parameters*   `href` **[string][513]**&#x20;Returns **([string][513] | [number][524] | [undefined][531])** page### pageFromPercentageGet a Page from Book percentage#### Parameters*   `percent` **[number][524]**&#x20;Returns **[number][524]** page### percentageFromPageReturns a value between 0 - 1 corresponding to the location of a page#### Parameters*   `pg` **[number][524]** the pageReturns **[number][524]** percentage### percentageFromCfiReturns a value between 0 - 1 corresponding to the location of a cfi#### Parameters*   `cfi` **[string][513]** EpubCFI StringReturns **[number][524]** percentage### destroyDestroy## ArchiveHandles Unzipping a requesting files from an Epub Archive### openOpen an archive#### Parameters*   `input` **binary**&#x20;
*   `isBase64` **[boolean][516]?** tells JSZip if the input data is base64 encodedReturns **[Promise][517]** zipfile### openUrlLoad and Open an archive#### Parameters*   `zipUrl` **[string][513]**&#x20;
*   `isBase64` **[boolean][516]?** tells JSZip if the input data is base64 encodedReturns **[Promise][517]** zipfile### requestRequest a url from the archive#### Parameters*   `url` **[string][513]** a url to request from the archive
*   `type` **[string][513]?** specify the type of the returned resultReturns **[Promise][517]<([Blob][532] | [string][513] | [JSON][528] | [Document][519] | XMLDocument)>** ### getBlobGet a Blob from Archive by Url#### Parameters*   `url` **[string][513]**&#x20;
*   `mimeType` **[string][513]?**&#x20;Returns **[Blob][532]** ### getTextGet Text from Archive by Url#### Parameters*   `url` **[string][513]**&#x20;
*   `encoding` **[string][513]?**&#x20;Returns **[string][513]** ### getBase64Get a base64 encoded result from Archive by Url#### Parameters*   `url` **[string][513]**&#x20;
*   `mimeType` **[string][513]?**&#x20;Returns **[string][513]** base64 encoded### createUrlCreate a Url from an unarchived item#### Parameters*   `url` **[string][513]**&#x20;
*   `options` &#x20;Returns **[Promise][517]** url promise with Url string### revokeUrlRevoke Temp Url for a archive item#### Parameters*   `url` **[string][513]** url of the item in the archive## StoreHandles saving and requesting files from local storage### Parameters*   `name` **[string][513]** This should be the name of the application for modals
*   `requester` **[function][530]?**&#x20;
*   `resolver` **[function][530]?**&#x20;### addAdd all of a book resources to the store#### Parameters*   `resources` **[Resources][137]** book resources
*   `force` **[boolean][516]?** force resaving resourcesReturns **[Promise][517]<[object][515]>** store objects### putPut binary data from a url to storage#### Parameters*   `url` **[string][513]** a url to request from storage
*   `withCredentials` **[boolean][516]?**&#x20;
*   `headers` **[object][515]?**&#x20;Returns **[Promise][517]<[Blob][532]>** ### requestRequest a url#### Parameters*   `url` **[string][513]** a url to request from storage
*   `type` **[string][513]?** specify the type of the returned result
*   `withCredentials` **[boolean][516]?**&#x20;
*   `headers` **[object][515]?**&#x20;Returns **[Promise][517]<([Blob][532] | [string][513] | [JSON][528] | [Document][519] | XMLDocument)>** ### retrieveRequest a url from storage#### Parameters*   `url` **[string][513]** a url to request from storage
*   `type` **[string][513]?** specify the type of the returned resultReturns **[Promise][517]<([Blob][532] | [string][513] | [JSON][528] | [Document][519] | XMLDocument)>** ### getBlobGet a Blob from Storage by Url#### Parameters*   `url` **[string][513]**&#x20;
*   `mimeType` **[string][513]?**&#x20;Returns **[Blob][532]** ### getTextGet Text from Storage by Url#### Parameters*   `url` **[string][513]**&#x20;
*   `mimeType` **[string][513]?**&#x20;Returns **[string][513]** ### getBase64Get a base64 encoded result from Storage by Url#### Parameters*   `url` **[string][513]**&#x20;
*   `mimeType` **[string][513]?**&#x20;Returns **[string][513]** base64 encoded### createUrlCreate a Url from a stored item#### Parameters*   `url` **[string][513]**&#x20;
*   `options` &#x20;Returns **[Promise][517]** url promise with Url string### revokeUrlRevoke Temp Url for a archive item#### Parameters*   `url` **[string][513]** url of the item in the store## RenditionDisplays an Epub as a series of Views for each Section.
Requires Manager and View class to handle specifics of rendering
the section content.### Parameters*   `book` **[Book][4]**&#x20;
*   `options` **[object][515]?**&#x20;

    *   `options.width` **[number][524]?**&#x20;
    *   `options.height` **[number][524]?**&#x20;
    *   `options.ignoreClass` **[string][513]?** class for the cfi parser to ignore
    *   `options.manager` **([string][513] | [function][530] | [object][515])**  (optional, default `'default'`)
    *   `options.view` **([string][513] | [function][530])**  (optional, default `'iframe'`)
    *   `options.layout` **[string][513]?** layout to force
    *   `options.spread` **[string][513]?** force spread value
    *   `options.minSpreadWidth` **[number][524]?** overridden by spread: none (never) / both (always)
    *   `options.stylesheet` **[string][513]?** url of stylesheet to be injected
    *   `options.resizeOnOrientationChange` **[boolean][516]?** false to disable orientation events
    *   `options.script` **[string][513]?** url of script to be injected
    *   `options.snap` **([boolean][516] | [object][515])** use snap scrolling (optional, default `false`)
    *   `options.defaultDirection` **[string][513]** default text direction (optional, default `'ltr'`)
    *   `options.allowScriptedContent` **[boolean][516]** enable running scripts in content (optional, default `false`)
    *   `options.allowPopups` **[boolean][516]** enable opening popup in content (optional, default `false`)### setManagerSet the manager function#### Parameters*   `manager` **[function][530]**&#x20;### requireManagerRequire the manager from passed string, or as a class function#### Parameters*   `manager` **([string][513] | [object][515])** \[description]Returns **method** ### requireViewRequire the view from passed string, or as a class function#### Parameters*   `view` **([string][513] | [object][515])**&#x20;Returns **view** ### startStart the renderingReturns **[Promise][517]** rendering has started### attachToCall to attach the container to an element in the dom
Container must be attached before rendering can begin#### Parameters*   `element` **[element][518]** to attach toReturns **[Promise][517]** ### displayDisplay a point in the book
The request will be added to the rendering Queue,
so it will wait until book is opened, rendering started
and all other rendering tasks have finished to be called.#### Parameters*   `target` **[string][513]** Url or EpubCFIReturns **[Promise][517]** ### moveToMove the Rendition to a specific offset
Usually you would be better off calling display()#### Parameters*   `offset` **[object][515]**&#x20;### resizeTrigger a resize of the views#### Parameters*   `width` **[number][524]?**&#x20;
*   `height` **[number][524]?**&#x20;
*   `epubcfi` **[string][513]?** (optional)### clearClear all rendered views### nextGo to the next "page" in the renditionReturns **[Promise][517]** ### prevGo to the previous "page" in the renditionReturns **[Promise][517]** ### flowAdjust the flow of the rendition to paginated or scrolled
(scrolled-continuous vs scrolled-doc are handled by different view managers)#### Parameters*   `flow` **[string][513]**&#x20;### layoutAdjust the layout of the rendition to reflowable or pre-paginated#### Parameters*   `settings` **[object][515]**&#x20;### spreadAdjust if the rendition uses spreads#### Parameters*   `spread` **[string][513]** none | auto (TODO: implement landscape, portrait, both)
*   `min` **int?** min width to use spreads at### directionAdjust the direction of the rendition#### Parameters*   `dir` **[string][513]**&#x20;### reportLocationReport the current location### currentLocationGet the Current Location objectReturns **(displayedLocation | [promise][517])** location (may be a promise)### destroyRemove and Clean Up the Rendition### getRangeGet a Range from a Visible CFI#### Parameters*   `cfi` **[string][513]** EpubCfi String
*   `ignoreClass` **[string][513]**&#x20;Returns **[range][526]** ### getContentsGet the Contents object of each rendered viewReturns **[Array][525]<[Contents][372]>** ### viewsGet the views member from the managerReturns **Views** ### hooksAdds Hook methods to the Rendition prototypeType: [object][515]### themesType: [Themes][242]### annotationsType: [Annotations][243]### locationA Rendered Location RangeType: [Object][515]#### Properties*   `start` **[object][515]**&#x20;

    *   `start.index` **[string][513]**&#x20;
    *   `start.href` **[string][513]**&#x20;
    *   `start.displayed` **[object][515]**&#x20;

        *   `start.displayed.page` **[number][524]**&#x20;
        *   `start.displayed.total` **[number][524]**&#x20;
    *   `start.cfi` **[EpubCFI][355]**&#x20;
    *   `start.location` **[number][524]**&#x20;
    *   `start.percentage` **[number][524]**&#x20;
*   `end` **[object][515]**&#x20;

    *   `end.index` **[string][513]**&#x20;
    *   `end.href` **[string][513]**&#x20;
    *   `end.displayed` **[object][515]**&#x20;

        *   `end.displayed.page` **[number][524]**&#x20;
        *   `end.displayed.total` **[number][524]**&#x20;
    *   `end.cfi` **[EpubCFI][355]**&#x20;
    *   `end.location` **[number][524]**&#x20;
    *   `end.percentage` **[number][524]**&#x20;
*   `atStart` **[boolean][516]**&#x20;
*   `atEnd` **[boolean][516]**&#x20;### started### startedEmit that rendering has started### attachedEmit that rendering has attached to an element### displayedEmit that a section has been displayed#### Parameters*   `section` **[Section][16]**&#x20;### displayErrorEmit that has been an error displaying#### Parameters*   `section` **[Section][16]**&#x20;### renderedEmit that a section has been rendered#### Parameters*   `section` **[Section][16]**&#x20;
*   `view` **View**&#x20;### removedEmit that a section has been removed#### Parameters*   `section` **[Section][16]**&#x20;
*   `view` **View**&#x20;### resizedEmit that the rendition has been resized#### Parameters*   `width` **[number][524]**&#x20;
*   `height` **height**&#x20;
*   `epubcfi` **[string][513]** (optional)### orientationchangeEmit that the rendition has been rotated#### Parameters*   `orientation` **[string][513]**&#x20;### locationChangedType: [object][515]#### Properties*   `index` **[number][524]**&#x20;
*   `href` **[string][513]**&#x20;
*   `start` **[EpubCFI][355]**&#x20;
*   `end` **[EpubCFI][355]**&#x20;
*   `percentage` **[number][524]**&#x20;**Meta***   **deprecated**: This is deprecated.### relocatedType: displayedLocation### selectedEmit that a text selection has occurred#### Parameters*   `cfirange` **[string][513]**&#x20;
*   `contents` **[Contents][372]**&#x20;### markClickedEmit that a mark was clicked#### Parameters*   `cfirange` **[EpubCFI][355]**&#x20;
*   `data` **[object][515]**&#x20;
*   `contents` **[Contents][372]**&#x20;## HookHooks allow for injecting functions that must all complete in order before finishing
They will execute in parallel but all must finish before continuing
Functions may return a promise if they are async.### Parameters*   `context` **any** scope of this### Examples```javascript
this.content = new EPUBJS.Hook(this);
```### registerAdds a function to be run before a hook completes#### Examples```javascript
this.content.register(function(){...});
```### deregisterRemoves a function#### Parameters*   `func` &#x20;#### Examples```javascript
this.content.deregister(function(){...});
```### triggerTriggers a hook to run all functions#### Examples```javascript
this.content.trigger(args).then(function(){...});
```## QueueQueue for handling tasks one at a time### Parameters*   `context` **scope** what this will resolve to in the tasks### enqueueAdd an item to the queueReturns **[Promise][517]** ### dequeueRun one itemReturns **[Promise][517]** ### runRun all tasks sequentially, at convinceReturns **[Promise][517]** ### flushFlush all, as quickly as possibleReturns **[Promise][517]** ### clearClear all items in wait### lengthGet the number of tasks in the queueReturns **[number][524]** tasks### pausePause a running queue### stopEnd the queue## LayoutFigures out the CSS values to apply for a layout### Parameters*   `settings` **[object][515]**&#x20;

    *   `settings.layout` **[string][513]**  (optional, default `'reflowable'`)
    *   `settings.spread` **[string][513]?**&#x20;
    *   `settings.minSpreadWidth` **[number][524]**  (optional, default `800`)
    *   `settings.evenSpreads` **[boolean][516]**  (optional, default `false`)### flowSwitch the flow between paginated and scrolled#### Parameters*   `flow` **[string][513]** paginated | scrolledReturns **[string][513]** simplified flow### spreadSwitch between using spreads or not, and set the
width at which they switch to single.#### Parameters*   `spread` **[string][513]** "none" | "always" | "auto"
*   `min` **[number][524]** integer in pixelsReturns **[boolean][516]** spread true | false### calculateCalculate the dimensions of the pagination#### Parameters*   `_width` **[number][524]** width of the rendering
*   `_height` **[number][524]** height of the rendering
*   `_gap` **[number][524]** width of the gap between columns### formatApply Css to a Document#### Parameters*   `contents` **[Contents][372]**&#x20;
*   `section` &#x20;
*   `axis` &#x20;Returns **[Promise][517]** ### countCount number of pages#### Parameters*   `totalLength` **[number][524]**&#x20;
*   `pageLength` **[number][524]**&#x20;Returns **{spreads: [Number][524], pages: [Number][524]}** ## ThemesThemes to apply to displayed content### Parameters*   `rendition` **[Rendition][206]**&#x20;### registerAdd themes to be used by a rendition#### Examples```javascript
themes.register("light", "http://example.com/light.css")
``````javascript
themes.register("light", { "body": { "color": "purple"}})
``````javascript
themes.register({ "light" : {...}, "dark" : {...}})
```### defaultAdd a default theme to be used by a rendition#### Parameters*   `theme` **([object][515] | [string][513])**&#x20;#### Examples```javascript
themes.register("http://example.com/default.css")
``````javascript
themes.register({ "body": { "color": "purple"}})
```### registerThemesRegister themes object#### Parameters*   `themes` **[object][515]**&#x20;### registerCssRegister a theme by passing its css as string#### Parameters*   `name` **[string][513]**&#x20;
*   `css` **[string][513]**&#x20;### registerUrlRegister a url#### Parameters*   `name` **[string][513]**&#x20;
*   `input` **[string][513]**&#x20;### registerRulesRegister rule#### Parameters*   `name` **[string][513]**&#x20;
*   `rules` **[object][515]**&#x20;### selectSelect a theme#### Parameters*   `name` **[string][513]**&#x20;### updateUpdate a theme#### Parameters*   `name` **[string][513]**&#x20;### injectInject all themes into contents#### Parameters*   `contents` **[Contents][372]**&#x20;### addAdd Theme to contents#### Parameters*   `name` **[string][513]**&#x20;
*   `contents` **[Contents][372]**&#x20;### overrideAdd override#### Parameters*   `name` **[string][513]**&#x20;
*   `value` **[string][513]**&#x20;
*   `priority` **[boolean][516]**&#x20;### overridesAdd all overrides#### Parameters*   `contents` &#x20;
*   `content` **Content**&#x20;### fontSizeAdjust the font size of a rendition#### Parameters*   `size` **[number][524]**&#x20;### fontAdjust the font-family of a rendition#### Parameters*   `f` **[string][513]**&#x20;## AnnotationsHandles managing adding & removing Annotations### Parameters*   `rendition` **[Rendition][206]**&#x20;### addAdd an annotation to store#### Parameters*   `type` **[string][513]** Type of annotation to add: "highlight", "underline", "mark"
*   `cfiRange` **[EpubCFI][355]** EpubCFI range to attach annotation to
*   `data` **[object][515]** Data to assign to annotation
*   `cb` **[function][530]?** Callback after annotation is added
*   `className` **[string][513]** CSS class to assign to annotation
*   `styles` **[object][515]** CSS styles to assign to annotationReturns **[Annotation][346]** annotation### removeRemove an annotation from store#### Parameters*   `cfiRange` **[EpubCFI][355]** EpubCFI range the annotation is attached to
*   `type` **[string][513]** Type of annotation to add: "highlight", "underline", "mark"### highlightAdd a highlight to the store#### Parameters*   `cfiRange` **[EpubCFI][355]** EpubCFI range to attach annotation to
*   `data` **[object][515]** Data to assign to annotation
*   `cb` **[function][530]** Callback after annotation is clicked
*   `className` **[string][513]** CSS class to assign to annotation
*   `styles` **[object][515]** CSS styles to assign to annotation### underlineAdd a underline to the store#### Parameters*   `cfiRange` **[EpubCFI][355]** EpubCFI range to attach annotation to
*   `data` **[object][515]** Data to assign to annotation
*   `cb` **[function][530]** Callback after annotation is clicked
*   `className` **[string][513]** CSS class to assign to annotation
*   `styles` **[object][515]** CSS styles to assign to annotation### markAdd a mark to the store#### Parameters*   `cfiRange` **[EpubCFI][355]** EpubCFI range to attach annotation to
*   `data` **[object][515]** Data to assign to annotation
*   `cb` **[function][530]** Callback after annotation is clicked### eachiterate over annotations in the store### show\[Not Implemented] Show annotations### hide\[Not Implemented] Hide annotations## AnnotationAnnotation object### Parameters*   `$0` **[Object][515]**&#x20;

    *   `$0.type` &#x20;
    *   `$0.cfiRange` &#x20;
    *   `$0.data` &#x20;
    *   `$0.sectionIndex` &#x20;
    *   `$0.cb` &#x20;
    *   `$0.className` &#x20;
    *   `$0.styles` &#x20;
*   `options` **[object][515]**&#x20;

    *   `options.type` **[string][513]** Type of annotation to add: "highlight", "underline", "mark"
    *   `options.cfiRange` **[EpubCFI][355]** EpubCFI range to attach annotation to
    *   `options.data` **[object][515]** Data to assign to annotation
    *   `options.sectionIndex` **int** Index in the Spine of the Section annotation belongs to
    *   `options.cb` **[function][530]?** Callback after annotation is clicked
*   `className` **[string][513]** CSS class to assign to annotation
*   `styles` **[object][515]** CSS styles to assign to annotationReturns **[Annotation][346]** annotation### updateUpdate stored data#### Parameters*   `data` **[object][515]**&#x20;### attachAdd to a view#### Parameters*   `view` **View**&#x20;### detachRemove from a view#### Parameters*   `view` **View**&#x20;### text\[Not Implemented] Get text of an annotation## EpubCFIParsing and creation of EpubCFIs: [http://www.idpf.org/epub/linking/cfi/epub-cfi.html][533]Implements:*   Character Offset: epubcfi(/6/4\[chap01ref]!/4\[body01]/10\[para05]/2/1:3)
*   Simple Ranges : epubcfi(/6/4\[chap01ref]!/4\[body01]/10\[para05],/2/1:1,/3:4)Does Not Implement:*   Temporal Offset (\~)
*   Spatial Offset (@)
*   Temporal-Spatial Offset (\~ + @)
*   Text Location Assertion (\[)### Parameters*   `cfiFrom` **([string][513] | [Range][526] | [Node][534])?**&#x20;
*   `base` **([string][513] | [object][515])?**&#x20;
*   `ignoreClass` **[string][513]?** class to ignore when parsing DOM### parseParse a cfi string to a CFI object representation#### Parameters*   `cfiStr` **[string][513]**&#x20;Returns **[object][515]** cfi### toStringConvert CFI to a epubcfi(...) stringReturns **[string][513]** epubcfi### compareCompare which of two CFIs is earlier in the text#### Parameters*   `cfiOne` &#x20;
*   `cfiTwo` &#x20;Returns **[number][524]** First is earlier = -1, Second is earlier = 1, They are equal = 0### fromRangeCreate a CFI object from a Range#### Parameters*   `range` **[Range][526]**&#x20;
*   `base` **([string][513] | [object][515])**&#x20;
*   `ignoreClass` **[string][513]?**&#x20;Returns **[object][515]** cfi### fromNodeCreate a CFI object from a Node#### Parameters*   `anchor` **[Node][534]**&#x20;
*   `base` **([string][513] | [object][515])**&#x20;
*   `ignoreClass` **[string][513]?**&#x20;Returns **[object][515]** cfi### toRangeCreates a DOM range representing a CFI#### Parameters*   `_doc` **[document][519]** document referenced in the base
*   `ignoreClass` **[string][513]?**&#x20;Returns **[Range][526]** ### isCfiStringCheck if a string is wrapped with "epubcfi()"#### Parameters*   `str` **[string][513]**&#x20;Returns **[boolean][516]** ### collapseCollapse a CFI Range to a single CFI Position#### Parameters*   `toStart` **[boolean][516]**  (optional, default `false`)## ContentsHandles DOM manipulation, queries and events for View contents### Parameters*   `doc` **[document][519]** Document
*   `content` **[element][518]** Parent Element (typically Body)
*   `cfiBase` **[string][513]** Section component of CFIs
*   `sectionIndex` **[number][524]** Index in Spine of Conntent's Section
*   `sectionHref` **[string][513]** Section href### widthGet or Set width#### Parameters*   `w` **[number][524]?**&#x20;Returns **[number][524]** width### heightGet or Set height#### Parameters*   `h` **[number][524]?**&#x20;Returns **[number][524]** height### contentWidthGet or Set width of the contents#### Parameters*   `w` **[number][524]?**&#x20;Returns **[number][524]** width### contentHeightGet or Set height of the contents#### Parameters*   `h` **[number][524]?**&#x20;Returns **[number][524]** height### textWidthGet the width of the text using RangeReturns **[number][524]** width### textHeightGet the height of the text using RangeReturns **[number][524]** height### scrollWidthGet documentElement scrollWidthReturns **[number][524]** width### scrollHeightGet documentElement scrollHeightReturns **[number][524]** height### overflowSet overflow css style of the contents#### Parameters*   `overflow` **[string][513]?**&#x20;### overflowXSet overflowX css style of the documentElement#### Parameters*   `overflow` **[string][513]?**&#x20;### overflowYSet overflowY css style of the documentElement#### Parameters*   `overflow` **[string][513]?**&#x20;### cssSet Css styles on the contents element (typically Body)#### Parameters*   `property` **[string][513]**&#x20;
*   `value` **[string][513]**&#x20;
*   `priority` **[boolean][516]?** set as "important"### viewportGet or Set the viewport element#### Parameters*   `options` **[object][515]?**&#x20;

    *   `options.width` **[string][513]?**&#x20;
    *   `options.height` **[string][513]?**&#x20;
    *   `options.scale` **[string][513]?**&#x20;
    *   `options.minimum` **[string][513]?**&#x20;
    *   `options.maximum` **[string][513]?**&#x20;
    *   `options.scalable` **[string][513]?**&#x20;### rootGet the documentElementReturns **[element][518]** documentElement### locationOfGet the location offset of a EpubCFI or an #id#### Parameters*   `target` **([string][513] | [EpubCFI][355])**&#x20;
*   `ignoreClass` **[string][513]?** for the cfi### addStylesheetAppend a stylesheet link to the document head#### Parameters*   `src` **[string][513]** url### addStylesheetCssAppend stylesheet css#### Parameters*   `serializedCss` **[string][513]**&#x20;
*   `key` **[string][513]** If the key is the same, the CSS will be replaced instead of inserted### addStylesheetRulesAppend stylesheet rules to a generate stylesheet
Array: [https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/API/CSSStyleSheet/insertRule][535]
Object: [https://github.com/desirable-objects/json-to-css][536]#### Parameters*   `rules` **([array][525] | [object][515])**&#x20;
*   `key` **[string][513]** If the key is the same, the CSS will be replaced instead of inserted### addScriptAppend a script tag to the document head#### Parameters*   `src` **[string][513]** urlReturns **[Promise][517]** loaded### addClassAdd a class to the contents container#### Parameters*   `className` **[string][513]**&#x20;### removeClassRemove a class from the contents container#### Parameters*   `className` &#x20;
*   `removeClass` **[string][513]**&#x20;### rangeGet a Dom Range from EpubCFI#### Parameters*   `_cfi` **[EpubCFI][355]**&#x20;
*   `ignoreClass` **[string][513]?**&#x20;Returns **[Range][526]** range### cfiFromRangeGet an EpubCFI from a Dom Range#### Parameters*   `range` **[Range][526]**&#x20;
*   `ignoreClass` **[string][513]?**&#x20;Returns **[EpubCFI][355]** cfi### cfiFromNodeGet an EpubCFI from a Dom node#### Parameters*   `node` **[node][534]**&#x20;
*   `ignoreClass` **[string][513]?**&#x20;Returns **[EpubCFI][355]** cfi### sizeSize the contents to a given width and height#### Parameters*   `width` **[number][524]?**&#x20;
*   `height` **[number][524]?**&#x20;### columnsApply columns to the contents for pagination#### Parameters*   `width` **[number][524]**&#x20;
*   `height` **[number][524]**&#x20;
*   `columnWidth` **[number][524]**&#x20;
*   `gap` **[number][524]**&#x20;
*   `dir` &#x20;### scalerScale contents from center#### Parameters*   `scale` **[number][524]**&#x20;
*   `offsetX` **[number][524]**&#x20;
*   `offsetY` **[number][524]**&#x20;### fitFit contents into a fixed width and height#### Parameters*   `width` **[number][524]**&#x20;
*   `height` **[number][524]**&#x20;
*   `section` &#x20;### directionSet the direction of the text#### Parameters*   `dir` **[string][513]** "rtl" | "ltr" (optional, default `"ltr"`)### writingModeSet the writingMode of the text#### Parameters*   `mode` **[string][513]** "horizontal-tb" | "vertical-rl" | "vertical-lr" (optional, default `"horizontal-tb"`)### listenedEventsGet DOM events that are listened for and passed along## MappingMap text locations to CFI ranges### Parameters*   `layout` **[Layout][228]** Layout to apply
*   `direction` **[string][513]** Text direction (optional, default `"ltr"`)
*   `axis` **[string][513]** vertical or horizontal axis (optional, default `"horizontal"`)
*   `dev` **[boolean][516]?** toggle developer highlighting (optional, default `false`)### sectionFind CFI pairs for entire section at once#### Parameters*   `view` &#x20;### pageFind CFI pairs for a page#### Parameters*   `contents` **[Contents][372]** Contents from view
*   `cfiBase` **[string][513]** string of the base for a cfi
*   `start` **[number][524]** position to start at
*   `end` **[number][524]** position to end at### axisSet the axis for mapping#### Parameters*   `axis` **[string][513]** horizontal | verticalReturns **[boolean][516]** is it horizontal?## CoreCore Utilities and Helpers### requestAnimationFrameVendor prefixed requestAnimationFrameReturns **[function][530]** requestAnimationFrame### uuidGenerates a UUID
based on: [http://stackoverflow.com/questions/105034/how-to-create-a-guid-uuid-in-javascript][537]Returns **[string][513]** uuid### documentHeightGets the height of a documentReturns **[number][524]** height### isElementChecks if a node is an element#### Parameters*   `obj` **[object][515]**&#x20;Returns **[boolean][516]** ### isNumber#### Parameters*   `n` **any**&#x20;Returns **[boolean][516]** ### isFloat#### Parameters*   `n` **any**&#x20;Returns **[boolean][516]** ### prefixedGet a prefixed css property#### Parameters*   `unprefixed` **[string][513]**&#x20;Returns **[string][513]** ### defaultsApply defaults to an object#### Parameters*   `obj` **[object][515]**&#x20;Returns **[object][515]** ### extendExtend properties of an object#### Parameters*   `target` **[object][515]**&#x20;Returns **[object][515]** ### insertFast quicksort insert for sorted array -- based on:
[http://stackoverflow.com/questions/1344500/efficient-way-to-insert-a-number-into-a-sorted-array-of-numbers][538]#### Parameters*   `item` **any**&#x20;
*   `array` **[array][525]**&#x20;
*   `compareFunction` **[function][530]?**&#x20;Returns **[number][524]** location (in array)### locationOfFinds where something would fit into a sorted array#### Parameters*   `item` **any**&#x20;
*   `array` **[array][525]**&#x20;
*   `compareFunction` **[function][530]?**&#x20;
*   `_start` **[function][530]?**&#x20;
*   `_end` **[function][530]?**&#x20;Returns **[number][524]** location (in array)### indexOfSortedFinds index of something in a sorted array
Returns -1 if not found#### Parameters*   `item` **any**&#x20;
*   `array` **[array][525]**&#x20;
*   `compareFunction` **[function][530]?**&#x20;
*   `_start` **[function][530]?**&#x20;
*   `_end` **[function][530]?**&#x20;Returns **[number][524]** index (in array) or -1### boundsFind the bounds of an element
taking padding and margin into account#### Parameters*   `el` **[element][518]**&#x20;Returns **{width: [Number][524], height: [Number][524]}** ### bordersFind the bounds of an element
taking padding, margin and borders into account#### Parameters*   `el` **[element][518]**&#x20;Returns **{width: [Number][524], height: [Number][524]}** ### nodeBoundsFind the bounds of any node
allows for getting bounds of text nodes by wrapping them in a range#### Parameters*   `node` **[node][534]**&#x20;Returns **BoundingClientRect** ### windowBoundsFind the equivalent of getBoundingClientRect of a browser windowReturns **{width: [Number][524], height: [Number][524], top: [Number][524], left: [Number][524], right: [Number][524], bottom: [Number][524]}** ### indexOfNodeGets the index of a node in its parent#### Parameters*   `node` **[Node][534]**&#x20;
*   `typeId` **[string][513]**&#x20;Returns **[number][524]** index### indexOfTextNodeGets the index of a text node in its parent#### Parameters*   `textNode` **[node][534]**&#x20;Returns **[number][524]** index### indexOfElementNodeGets the index of an element node in its parent#### Parameters*   `elementNode` **[element][518]**&#x20;Returns **[number][524]** index### isXmlCheck if extension is xml#### Parameters*   `ext` **[string][513]**&#x20;Returns **[boolean][516]** ### createBlobCreate a new blob#### Parameters*   `content` **any**&#x20;
*   `mime` **[string][513]**&#x20;Returns **[Blob][532]** ### createBlobUrlCreate a new blob url#### Parameters*   `content` **any**&#x20;
*   `mime` **[string][513]**&#x20;Returns **[string][513]** url### revokeBlobUrlRemove a blob url#### Parameters*   `url` **[string][513]**&#x20;### createBase64UrlCreate a new base64 encoded url#### Parameters*   `content` **any**&#x20;
*   `mime` **[string][513]**&#x20;Returns **[string][513]** url### typeGet type of an object#### Parameters*   `obj` **[object][515]**&#x20;Returns **[string][513]** type### parseParse xml (or html) markup#### Parameters*   `markup` **[string][513]**&#x20;
*   `mime` **[string][513]**&#x20;
*   `forceXMLDom` **[boolean][516]** force using xmlDom to parse instead of native parserReturns **[document][519]** document### qsquerySelector polyfill#### Parameters*   `el` **[element][518]**&#x20;
*   `sel` **[string][513]** selector stringReturns **[element][518]** element### qsaquerySelectorAll polyfill#### Parameters*   `el` **[element][518]**&#x20;
